qa_pairs.question: How do I access the job monitoring interface in Open OnDemand?
qa_pairs.answer: To get an overview of all your jobs in the queue, navigate to the 'Jobs' tab and select 'Active Jobs' in the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface.

qa_pairs.question: How can I filter jobs in the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: You can filter jobs by using the 'Filter' text box located at the top right of the job monitoring interface.

qa_pairs.question: Is it possible to sort jobs in the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, columns in the job monitoring interface can be sorted by clicking on the column headers, for example, to sort by job status (running, completed, failed, etc.).

qa_pairs.question: How do I view more detailed information about a specific job in the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To view more details about a job, such as its start/end time, node list, and account charged, click on the `>` symbol to the left of that job.

qa_pairs.question: How can I display all jobs in the queue using the Open OnDemand job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: To show all jobs in the queue, click on the drop-down menu at the top right of the interface and select 'All Jobs'.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find an even more detailed view of my jobs beyond the Open OnDemand monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: A more detailed view of your jobs can still be found using the my.SciNet portal at https://my.scinet.utoronto.ca.
